body.title: self_trainer: catch Ollama turns, not just cloud turns
body.result: Extended _read_candidate_turns() to include tier.2 (Ollama) turns alongside cloud turns (cost>threshold). Added OLLAMA_TIERS frozenset. Updated DB supplement path to also query EPISODIC memories with tier_hint in OLLAMA_TIERS via ANY(). Design conversations via Ollama now land in Igor's training matrix.
body.description: PROC_SELF_TRAINING scans interaction logs for cloud turns (cost > threshold, input > MIN_LEN). Design conversations via Ollama produce zero cost — they are invisible to self_trainer. Fix: extend self_trainer to also scan Ollama turns above MIN_LEN threshold, or add a separate signal (e.g. cc_send author=claude-code) as a training trigger. Result: back-and-forth design sessions with Claude Code land in Igor matrix.
